productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Navy Blue 3/4 Length Pants
description: Style NoteThree quarter length pants are the coolest bottoms to wear in the current season - and perhaps the most versatile too. Slip into this pair when on a long journey, a casual day at home or at the gym. Pair them with sports shoes or flip flops to suit the occasion.Product DetailsNavy blue three quarter length pants which have two zipped pockets on the sides, a wide elasticated waistband with drawstrings inside, engineered with climalite technology, adidas three patented stripes in white on the sides, toggle straps at the hem and branding printed below the left pocketMaterial and Care100% polyesterMachine wash at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not soak, tumble dry or bleachFlat dry in shadeCool iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size M
